failures.description: The agent failed because it invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments, using product_id 0 and omitting item_id instead of passing both required string IDs from the task.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to check whether item 1096508426 of product 1808611083 has difficulty level beginner. The required information was already available in the task and in the Coordinator's plan_query. At index 2, the Researcher attempted to call ProductCatalogSearch with an ill-formed payload: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted the required item_id and used an integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1808611083". The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3, confirming the invocation was malformed rather than a connectivity, access, or reasoning issue.
